playbook.intent: Stuck on prompt iteration → clear go/no-go on fine-tuning with LoRA SFT/DPO data prep, training, eval, or documented stay on prompt+retrieval.
playbook.scope: Structured decision and execution path: from baseline scorecard to a clear go/no-go on fine-tuning, including LoRA SFT/DPO data prep, training, eval, and deployment — or staying with prompt+retrieval if economics don't beat the floor.

success-criteria.criterion: Written decision (tune / stay) with cost+quality table
If tune: SFT/DPO dataset prepared, trained, evaluated, shadow-deployed
Cost-per-success better OR documented why we accepted parity

stage.name: Baseline
stage.intent: Record current cost+quality baseline on golden set.

tasks.task: Mine production traces for candidate training data

stage.decision-gate: Advance to Decide if a tune candidate beats the floor in projection.

stage.name: Decide Tune-Or-Not
stage.intent: Apply tune-vs-prompt rubric on projected ROI.
stage.decision-gate: If tune doesn't beat floor by ≥X% projected, exit playbook with decision logged.

stage.name: Data Prep

tasks.task: Add DPO pairs for preference signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after data audit and dedup pass.

stage.name: Train
stage.intent: LoRA or full SFT/DPO training run with eval gating.
stage.decision-gate: Promote only checkpoints beating baseline on golden + adversarial.

stage.name: Deploy
stage.intent: Shadow-deploy, then promote if eval-in-prod holds.
stage.decision-gate: Promote only after shadow holds for ≥1 release cycle.

extra.value: [Full RLHF pipeline from scratch — out of scope, Pretraining new base models — out of scope]
[Baseline prompt agent in production with logs, Sandbox account with fine-tuning quota]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content fine-tune-vs-prompt-decision-flow --format md, agent: faion get-content fine-tune-vs-prompt-decision-flow --format context, json: faion get-content fine-tune-vs-prompt-decision-flow --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
